reasoning: Both models incorrectly skipped PKGBUILD by misclassifying it as binary, leaving zero files reviewed. PKGBUILD is essential for AUR safety as it defines build/install behavior.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped due to false binary detection
No review of .install hooks or source scripts
false_negatives: All risks: No files were reviewed, including critical build scripts and network/filesystem operations
re_audit_focus: Source scripts referenced in build steps
learnings: Fix binary detection: Whitelist PKGBUILD/.install as text files regardless of content
Prioritize core AUR files (PKGBUILD > .install > source scripts) before other files
Add fallback: If PKGBUILD fails initial read, attempt hexdump/strings analysis
Improve error handling: Don't abort entire audit on single file error
